Northbank Heritage Credit & Care, Inc. (a U.S. issuer in healthcare and banking) enters this Data Processing Addendum to meet CCPA, HIPAA, and GLBA obligations and maintain Reg FD controls over investor communications.
Contact for DSAR and security incidents: privacy@nbhc-ficta.example, 1-855-555-0142; we do not sell personal information, and we do not collect or store full device MAC addresses.
For employee and analyst workflows, any material non-public information will be disclosed only via public earnings webcasts and current reports; no selective disclosure to Frostridge Analytics LLC or any broker-dealer is permitted.
Processing purpose: claims adjudication, patient billing, card issuance, and investor relations; retention 7 years for GLBA records and 6 years for HIPAA-designated record sets.
Mr. Aiden Carrow, Senior Clinical Billing Analyst at Northbank Heritage, based near 5th & Kline, Brimwood, OR 97200, uses device NBHC-CLN-104 (Win10) and VPN profile "brimwood-west".
Clustered identifiers for Mr. Carrow: a.carrow@nbhc-ficta.example, empId N B H C - 0 0 4 1 9, session sso:tkn_1q2w-3e4r, acct suffix ••4821, and DOB 1987-04-09 (age 38).
Access logs show OAuth redirect at https://intra.nbhc.example/dsar?req=ZXMtMTIwOA==&acct=****4821 and print job PJ- 2  9  7 at 03:14 PT in Ward 3B; this is routine operations metadata.
Negative statement: this paragraph contains only generic demographics (age 30–40, zip 941xx, device model "SlatePro") and should not be treated as identifying a specific person.
De-identification and aggregation apply for analytics, and public-source references (e.g., industry indices, published reimbursement rates) are not MNPI.
Transfers to sub-processors (e.g., CloudHarbor Health Data, FictaTrust Card Switch) occur under HIPAA BAAs, GLBA vendor due diligence, and SCCs if applicable to non-U.S. regions.
Consumers and patients may submit a DSAR via https://rights.nbhc.example/submit or mail Northbank Heritage Privacy Office, 101 Pine Arc, Brimwood, OR 97200, attn: DSAR Team.
We verify requestors via two-factor link codes and last interaction date; no biometric templates are stored, and we prevent combining DSAR data with trading models.
To minimize MNPI risk, pre-release clinical utilization trends are shared only in aggregated form; private emails to analysts like Ms. Rhea Vega at Frostridge must not include forecasts.
Example of non-personal operational tags: device NBHC-POS-778, acct ending ••0391, 30307, Q2 backlog 18%, 10.0.9.14; these values are not linked to any named individual.
